title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password returns 200 with user data and JWT token cookie/session.

title: postapiauthloginwithinvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401 Unauthorized.

title: postapionboardingwithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /api/onboarding with valid companyName, adminEmail, adminPassword, warehouseName, and categories creates company, user, and warehouse and returns 200.

title: postapionboardingwithmissingfields
description: Verify that POST /api/onboarding with missing or invalid required fields returns 400 Validation error.

title: postapiusersinvitebysuperadmin
description: Verify that POST /api/users/invite with authenticated super_admin credentials sends invitation and returns 200 with invitation record.

title: postapiusersinvitebynonsuperadmin
description: Verify that POST /api/users/invite with authenticated non-super_admin user returns 403 Forbidden.

title: postapiusersinviteacceptwithvalidtoken
description: Verify that POST /api/users/invite/accept with valid token and password creates user account and returns 200.

title: postapiusersinviteacceptwithinvalidtoken
description: Verify that POST /api/users/invite/accept with invalid token returns 400 Invalid token.

title: getapiuserswithsuperadmin
description: Verify that GET /api/users with authenticated super_admin returns 200 with company user list.

title: postapiproductscreatewithstock
description: Verify that POST /api/products/create-with-stock with product data and opening stock details creates product and stock in one operation and returns 200.
